We were really impressed with his professionalism and the level of service he provided. It was clear he genuinely wanted to help our family during a stressful situation rather than just treat it like another call.

What also stood out to us was his kindness and integrity.  He generously gave his time to help us when we needed it, which we truly appreciated. That kind of service and character goes a long way. His level of dedication and customer care is something you don’t come across very often anymore.

I would recommend these guys if you're on a budget and easy going.

Shane does have a lot going on personally (he was in the paper for being one of Brantford's first serious COVID cases and was hit pretty hard by that; you can imagine the lingering complications) but he does put in a lot of effort trying to do what he can. I got the sense though that he spreads himself too thin trying to please everybody. They would certainly benefit from a dedicated receptionist.

When they did my roof in 2020, before he got sick, the process was pretty efficient. The price was great and they did a lot of work really fast (including removing a crumbling brick chimney and filling the hole, and fixing a lot of big holes in the roof), but the process was quick and dirty and some of the finer details were rushed, though overall things looked good.

Five years later I had some problems and Shane did what was needed to fix things up at no extra charge, and his guys cleaned out my downspouts.

Thanks Dave!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Olga Leonetti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI45AREk9RUEf2I4BjuHkf6wwQ0oUz5057_iL0pykdNcdne8fsq=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend.

We got three quotes from different roofing companies. Dap Roofing came in the least expensive of all, was the most professional, and efficient from the start to finish. Didn't try to give us a discount if we put a sign on our front lawn with his company name on it or ask for a 50% deposit up-front before starting the job and deliver on what he promised and quoted.
I was referred to Dap when I posted on Facebook  ISO a metal roofing company, the person warned me it was easier and quicker to text the owner rather than call. Dave responded to my text straight away. He was on time for our appointment, he was professional, and easliy explained everything. He came out to our place twice as we were undecided on the roof colour and wanted to match it up right.
I asked him various questions all which he had no issues in answering. We booked the roof to get done late February to mid-March weather permitting. End of February he texted me to let me know the materials were being dropped off on Friday and the following Monday they would start the roof. Materials were delivered the guy was polite, asked where we wanted him to drop Materials off on the property, quick and efficient.  Monday came we had a wind warning, Dave texted me letting me due to wind warning they would start Tuesday weather permitting.  Tuesday morning  8 am a crew of 4 guys came started the roof by Wednesday afternoon they had completed the roof, cleaned everything up and were gone.  We were impressed how quick and efficient Dap Roofing and their crew got everything done. Our roof looks awesome. If your looking to get your roof done give Dap a call.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gail Fuller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcCUcK-U02jllHUQaFcDbJGn200eAlosA2_cFVO5LkszeUyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've used DAP Roofing twice. A couple of years ago on our house and more recently for my daughter's house. If he is on a job, you can leave a message and he gets back to you quickly. He and his crew are professional and respectful, they do awesome work and clean up the site afterwards. In fact, the first time we used them, we received two quotes for the same material and his was the better price. They do a great job which is why we didn't hesitate to call when we needed a roofer. Additionally, when my daughter's skylight was leaking, he came quickly and used a stopgap measure to stop the leaking until they could get to the roof, which they did shortly thereafter. On both houses we wanted him to install metal roofs that look like shingles plus new skylights. Both places look great. I highly recommend DAP Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matthew Correia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKL0FDrhrGabSMoi7PirL7JFp8MOfNrJyl79r-xEGXtJcUmJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As owner of Inner Bay Renovstions, I rely on good tradespersons to get the job done right.

[{"Name":"Jason North","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJX5Wb__gaqtLRY9AVUMdcpOPJW1igzi1NOhWlZsaPSX7dLnw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mark Acton Construction built us a detached garage in the spring/summer 2018. The project was completed in a timely and efficient manor.  Mark and his employees were professional and courteous in our interactions. Jason & Paula North","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEj4KO0gE&fid=0x0:0x18aa2a2bf97fd817"],"When":"2018-10-11"},{"Name":"Trish Ranson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcSDx8GlRwkphnIIUpFT1dkTsNCUH5swSQSG0S1KqCszbEw-dS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mark and his crew finished our entire basement from scratch. Thanks Mark","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID49KvR5QE&fid=0x0:0x18aa2a2bf97fd817"],"When":"2018-10-13"},{"Name":"Lee Ann Cotton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIU5LnYFwFc2TFPQvMyeReXdXttvlh_H2Ww7XZqz7MsqE3_2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wholeheartedly recommend Mark Acton and his crew! I felt like I had a partner that was watching out for  me - not just a vendor looking to make money off of me. And THAT's what helped me sleep at night as  we took a run-down retail space and transformed it into a high-end artisan bakery. 10/10 - highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wendy Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIihevajjRKuRKh_jdCuxOqCy1saH2f6BvX-6PcXqTwkpSfDg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have a 150+ year old home that needed substantial updates and renovations.  When demolition started I fully expected to have a total mess but I was amazed to come home to a very clean space everyday.   The crew was so neat and clean throughout the process that I didn't have to worry at all about dust and mess everywhere.  Mark touched base with me regularly throughout the process and was more than happy to answer any questions and address concerns.  He was also so incredibly flexible when I changed my mind...as women often do.  He was so patient and took the time to review options with me and meet at suppliers several times until I was happy with the choices.  The crew was incredibly friendly and professional.  Every day we look at our new space with amazement that Mark and his crew could turn what we had before into such a beautiful space.  It really is beyond our expectations and wildest dreams.  I highly recommend Mark's services!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Randy Hall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKw7EEFWB19V9zz0XmtbAV8Grik5OT40auiZe4vqb79wu6ufA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mark and his crew completed a bathroom renovation and addition for us. The renovation was a total gut back to the studs and the addition was a new room and enclosed porch. Mark took care of all design, permits, sub contractors and material purchases. We are very pleased with the finished work and receive compliments on it frequently. The crew were friendly, hard working and excellent craftspeople. They wanted to make sure that we were pleased at every step of the way. Mark was always available to answer any questions we had. He always arrived promptly for any scheduled meetings. I would not hesitate to recommend Mark for similar projects.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Radmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHeaF54eSK-R0e5uz6IhxHDPtj_mksp6puwb6QORuweH2tJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Contacted for repairs on a newly purchased house. This turned into a major renovation project from the front porch to the back deck and most rooms in between. Mark, his crew, sub trades and vendors were a pleasure to work with.
Bathroom is amazing, kitchen is awesome, bedroom is now bright and the rest of the upgrades have made the house our home.
Special mention for the design and build of the deck which is just what this house needed.
Thanks Mark and crew for all your hard work and ideas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doug Dalgetty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJn4pebAtD22GrVmL27-8sLLwO3qkaWr1p0G9Y0OCo9mvFWww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Over the past 14 years, we have had Mark Acton Construction do several repairs and remodelling work on our properly. We have been impressed with the quality and thoroughness of each job. The work was completed in a timely fashion each time and the cost was estimated accurately as well. We would have no hesitation in continuing to employ Mark Acton Construction in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thomas Pintwala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcjL5wAfgO1zHlT2aK1sHcD-2OlspCFUIVClbDdlA88PIrc8E=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent work by Mark and his crew was done on our cottage in 2013. Final phase, a new deck was built with a pergola.  Mark also assisted in the effort of acquiring Architectural drawings, Building permits and Conservation Authority permits and all required inspections.  During the planning and execution stages of the project, Mark was extremely helpful with design and renovation improvement ideas that increased the quality of the work done and our satisfaction of the overall result.","Images":null,"When":""}]

WJ Roofing is an outstanding company, committed to ensuring an excellent new roof (we are very happy) and also a wonderful customer experience.
We dealt with Chuck Harris who couldn’t have been more professional or considerate through the entire process.
Our installation team was led by Pete and the guys have a fierce work ethic, as well as being fastidious about details and also very polite and professional.

My timing allowed me to proceed through the light without stopping or yielding as it turned green before needing to brake, while this truck was stopped at the light. As I passed through with ample distance, the driver unexpectedly accelerated aggressively, seemingly to prevent me from merging ahead of him.

As my lane ended, his truck was suddenly beside me, creating a very dangerous situation. This was extremely reckless driving and could have resulted in a serious accident. Behaving this way is unacceptable.. especially while representing a company on a clearly marked vehicle.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Erica S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF6Sc9kCCp0WZooMQ7N-6tfQtwfnWsXvtB0YNo5CSv_hSj7AI7pg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Last year's snowfall wreaked havoc on our roof.
Justin came out to see what the situation was. He did a thorough inspection and provided quotes for 2 types of roof systems, explaining them in detail. This helped greatly in making the decision.
We made our decision, booked our time and experienced solid communication from Justin leading up to the install.
When the big day came, the team arrived early, introduced themselves and kept communication up during the process. This left us informed and the questions we did have were answered professionally and personally.
Justin, big thanks to you and your team for doing such a great job! We are 3 months post-install and not only has the product (steel) and workmanship held beautifully against the weather, we have received many compliments.
I'm very happy with the product and the team who installed.
If we ever have another project like this, we will be reaching out.
Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Crane Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWn39jb9WnkjXph11EO05bK_RyC8fmy9DvbbfVua78aR2WyXWE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Justin's JM Roof Company is fantastic and I recommend them very, very highly.

I reached out to a number of roofing companies to install a new roof at our lakeside cottage.  JM Roof Company was the only company where the owner of the company, Justin, personally got back to me.  All other companies had their sales representatives reach out.

Just was incredibly professional at every stage of the process.  His original quote was delivered promptly and with excellent detail.  I had a few questions on the quote which he answered clearly.  Leading up to the project, Justin communicated regularly on the start time.

The job itself was very well done and our roof looks amazing.  And our property was left tidier than it was when they started.  Justin himself searched the perimeter of our cottage with a metal detector to make sure not a single roofing nail was left on the ground.

Justin then followed up a couple of times after the project was complete to make sure everything was good and to see if there was anything more that he could do for us.  Incredible service.

Thank you Justin for our beautiful new roof and the excellent experience every step of the way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJyda-rQE&fid=0x0:0xdd02678b07c8acf5"],"When":"2023-7-19"},{"Name":"Janice Andrews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwrtbfLxQII2HSTlW0uZfplIwscArQb6cgH9ZoFGlHexZGCw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JM Roof Company completed our roof replacement, including many difficult valleys and a dormer. professional and resolved my roofing issue!

I spoke with Jay who asked me for information about the issue and some pictures to help him assess the situation. The next day I reached out to ask when he'd be able to come by to take a look and he let me know he was in the area and could come by in the next 30 mins. Jay spent an hour assessing the situation even using a super long hose I have to create fake rain, to try and figure out where the leak was. I feel he was honest with me about the solution and said that although he couldn't 100% assure that it would solve the issue but that he thought it would definitely. He took his time to explain what he found and how it would repair the roof, unlike the two other "professionals" who had previously come to come my home offering no solution, with one going so far as to tell me not to worry about it! Jay called back a couple of days later to say he'd be by the following week to do the repairs. Saturday he called and said he could do the repairs.  He installed downspouts, sealed holes from staples the builder left in my roof shingles and worked on my gutters. He and his partner worked efficiently and quickly.
The next day we had a downpour of rain and...I heard no dripping on my aluminum roof!! I was soooo happy and relieved. Thanks to Jay I feel the issue has been resolved!! Thanks again Jay and Pearson Roofing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Celine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXj2OX2xTNc3gK78-DHgkp076RKbVr8X7vr_z51GsyS8MRWHzKm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pearson Roofing sent two workers to remove snow and ice from my roof. I was in and out quickly and the yard worker was helpful and got me on my way fast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARmwqMOI1rH2uJEowOr0bo&fid=0x0:0x1a7861691e18fa1b"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Tamarra Livingston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKB9izPhLnaxG6VUwzIoJYIBx2F3CB2dMVRQ9kDIR0zrVE_9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I found this gem by accident. I am doing some home renovations and started out by looking on line for prices. I found the website to be very easy to navigate and find what I was looking for. After seeing that I could get what I wanted there, I made a trip to the store.

First thing I noticed was how clean and organized the store was. When I got to the counter, a very nice man greeted me and asked if he could help me. I told him what I was looking for and he quickly went and grabbed it, saving me so much time. I needed some items from outside as well as the other building. The guys outside were just a friendly and helpful. Unfortunately my vehicle wasn't big enough to pick up everything I bought but that was not a problem. The guys quickly loaded what would fit and said that I could come back for the rest later that day. I didn't get back to pick it up for 3 days and once again it was no problem.

The stuff here was very friendly and understanding. I highly recommend this place to everyone. They knew their stuff and weren't pushy about it. Way to go guys and girls.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Haring","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHL-cUdJIPe_4180Cq1-qLPJcvLoIXnX2G4Mm0d8BBX_VPxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time going there and was very impressed. One just offered me a verbal price, one provided a written quote and pressured right away for the job or time would run out, One was so disorganized I couldn't understand them.  Martin showed up on the day and time he had agreed to.  His presentation was extremely professional.  He not only new what the condition of my existing roof was but described what types of materials were now available on the market that would improve the work.  Price was in line and scope of work and options available was made clear.  A five man crew arrived on the date agreed and finished the job in a day, complete with cleanup.  Excellent workmanship with polite and courteous staff.  Will recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nikki Cee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgDd7pmXnRtxwQSZi4Br3FeMhycEwa4yCBBWgkP-Y3RntmmcwHmw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were victims of the no inspections or no house during COVID time. We bought the house in 2021, trusting the word of the seller that our roof was newly done in 2019.

Our roof started leaking 2 winters after we moved in and upon investigation, insurance advised us that our entire attic was covered in mold, and all of our attic insulation and plywood decking had to be replaced. Further, the shingles flew off during the first heavy snowfall due to poor workmanship, and because of no flashing, no window capping, and shingles "from at least 10 years ago", and terrible shingle placement, our entire roof had to be replaced.

We took their report and started looking for a contractor in April 2024.

The company working with the insurance company wouldn't give a quote unless we promised to pay 50% upfront with no payment plan available.

The second place we asked for a quote said he was very sorry for what happened to us but his company was too small to handle the scope of the work. He suggested we look for a large, well-known company that uses their own crews for everything.

We found Nailed it Roofing through Google reviews. The reviews were glowing and the photos looked really good! I liked the there were recent reviews and reviews from way back too - all were positive!

I sent an email requesting a free consult and quote. I received a reply telling me to call their office. Upon calling, I was quickly given an appointment time and day.

I could tell they were really busy when the agent called me back to inform me that they were down a worker for the week and were trying to move people around. However, the agent and the business worked their magic and made my original appointment work.

Martin the project manager was super professional and as my husband says, you can tell he is passionate about his job. We received a presentation with clear explanations. We received distinct packages with different levels of materials and warranties. We were educated about their certifications and how their manufacturer covers the warranties.

There was absolutely no pressure to sign or go with their company. When I asked, we were told that the deposit wouldn't be 50% of the cost, and that as first time roof shoppers, we were probably being duped lol.

It was a very reasonable deposit for the amount of work we were asking. They also advised the balance wouldn't be due until the work was completed. And the work wouldn't be considered completed until we were satisfied.

When I asked for the pricing of additional work that would be extra on top of the roofing, I was not promised anything or guaranteed anything; Martin said he would find out and let me know. I appreciated this because it did not create wild expectations.

Martin reached out within a reasonable timeframe (48hrs) with the additional quotes. His messages were friendly and efficient. We felt confident in his responses.

After deciding which package we wanted to go with, and we reached back out to Martin to confirm, everything moved along quickly from there.

Our project start was delayed due to rainy weather but once the crew came, the work was proficiently and neatly done.

The roofing crew were courteous and tidy. We were so impressed from start to finish of their care. They checked and took photos of our old plywood to show us the mold and photos of the newly installed plywood.

The insulation crew removed the moldy insulation and blew in 20inches of fresh insulation and ensured it was to code. They ensured our house was tidy throughout the process.

The aluminum crew were efficient and completed the job with friendliness and speed. The colour of the eaves matched our shingles so nicely and they kept our front yard so clean during and after installation.

The price was as quoted and everyone treated us and our neighbours with dignity and respect.

We are so pleased with the results and absolutely recommend Martin and Nailed It Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLoOHaxgE&fid=0x0:0xb2ee8b159f1751e9"],"When":"2024-6-14"},{"Name":"Mary Ma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU-0ax-7w_kyIVJKkjeXxf3E2Aef2tj9zV5hLN9EwwEQZ2xQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was very surprised that they came with a big crew. The site was well organized - the tools and materials were placed on a row, and clean. I have seen many construction sites, but rarely anyone like them.  Damian  manged the job site efficiently, the workers worked professorially, and were well trained.   Damian is a very kind man , he even helped me paint a wood siding area where I could not reach it by myself. When I asked for a quote for gutters and downspouts replacement, Damian went to check and told me that the gutter and downspouts looked ok, and did not need to waste money to be replaced.  Overall, their price is very reasonable, I strongly recommend this company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKm8Pn4wE&fid=0x0:0xb2ee8b159f1751e9"],"When":"2021-4-20"}]
